release_gate: Release notes must not publish NPS, CSAT, operator-satisfaction, or satisfaction-score claims while this receipt status is no_numeric_claim.
current_receipt: No external operator-study result is claimed by this repository. This receipt is the release-note guard: it keeps the NPS/operator-satisfaction denominator explicit and blocks numeric claims until a real measured study receipt replaces it.
recommended_collection_plan: Recruit at least five external operators who have not built the feature.
Ask each operator to perform the getting-started first-certificate journey against a release-candidate build.
Record completion, blockers, CSAT, NPS, and raw anonymized notes in a non-public study packet.
Replace this guard receipt with status=measured only when the anonymized packet and scoring summary exist.
